techniques.name: Phishing: Spearphishing Link
techniques.procedure: 300 active phishing URLs identified via OpenPhish, impersonating Netflix, Amazon, Instagram, Meta, Ledger, Trezor, MetaMask, and banking institutions.

techniques.name: Link Target
techniques.procedure: Phishing infrastructure hosted on legitimate platforms: Vercel, GitHub Pages, Webflow, Netlify, Cloudflare Workers, and IPFS — used to evade domain reputation blocklists.

techniques.name: Domains
techniques.procedure: Typosquatting domains impersonating Meta (invoice-ads-manager[.]com, accounts-admin-agency[.]com), Microsoft (authorised-support[.]com), and cryptocurrency exchanges.

techniques.name: Application Layer Protocol: Web Protocols
techniques.procedure: 5 active Emotet C2 IP addresses identified via Feodo Tracker, communicating over HTTP/HTTPS.
